\tzpentry{ID3432}{Full Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3432 introduces Full Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \Delta \Omega_i = \Delta \Omega_j \quad \forall i, j $$
